## Confections.IMoldedBonBonVersion interface

Version interface for molded bonbon confections. Includes mold and chocolate shell specifications.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IMoldedBonBonVersion extends IConfectionVersionBase 
```
**Extends:** [IConfectionVersionBase](./ts-chocolate.confections.iconfectionversionbase.md)
